system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Endurance against Attack roll
Type: Counter
Qi: 1

You channel your Qi to shrug off the effects of area attacks. This gives you an opportunity to reduce the Damage done to you by an area attack by channeling your Qi, reducing its effect against you. Roll Endurance against the attacker’s Attack roll, if you succeed, then you reduce their Damage roll by -1d10 (ignore the last die rolled, or if necessary, randomly determine the Damage die to ignore). If you get a Total Success you reduce the Damage roll by -2d10 instead. Cathartic: This allows you an opportunity to negate all effects of the attack against you entirely by making an Endurance Skill roll against your opponent’s Attack roll.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: This allows you an opportunity to negate all effects of the attack against you entirely by making an Endurance Skill roll against your opponent’s Attack roll.
